name: FolioXtracker
description: Multi-user investment portfolio tracker for Australian DIY investors, live at folioxtracker.com. Records trades across crypto and equity platforms, normalises everything to AUD, fetches daily prices from Yahoo Finance, and gives buy-only rebalance recommendations against category targets. Email/Google sign-in with multiple portfolios per account, broker file and IMAP auto-imports — open-source and self-hostable on Vercel or a Raspberry Pi.

name: SMART on FHIR Demo
description: A ~110-line SMART on FHIR app that launches inside a sandbox EHR, reads the patient and their observations, and writes a clinical note back — handling the addendum-vs-edit distinction EHRs treat differently in the wild. Most public SMART demos only read; this one writes back, which is where the interesting integration questions live.

name: Garage Door Left-Open Alert
description: An ESP32 that detects when the garage door has been left open and pushes an alert to my phone. Deliberately scoped to monitoring only — an earlier design drove the opener's control input via relay, but removing the actuator made the system cheaper, simpler, and incapable of causing harm. Runs standalone on the microcontroller with no hub or always-on server.
